posts.text: The EU does not so much kick policy proposals down the road as place them in bureaucratic black holes. What comes out—and when—is a matter of happenstance https://www.economist.com/europe/2026/06/25/the-eu-is-just-too-damn-slow?taid=6a40cb2744936800013cbebc&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: We are colonies cosplaying as selves.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
